Pole Barn Building

Custom post-frame construction in Greenville, SC & Anderson, SC. Workshops, barns, garages, and more built to last.

Get Estimate

Why Choose a Pole Barn?

✓

Custom Design

Barns built to your exact specifications and needs

✓

Quality Materials

Premium lumber, metal roofing, and durable hardware

✓

Fast Construction

Post-frame construction is quicker than traditional building

✓

Cost Effective

More affordable per square foot than conventional construction

✓

Versatile Uses

Agricultural, residential, commercial, or recreational

✓

Permit Handling

We help navigate local building codes and permits

Pole Barn Applications

Agricultural Barns

Equipment storage, hay barns, livestock shelters

Workshops

Personal or commercial workspace

Garages

RVs, motorhomes, classic car collections

Storage Buildings

Boats, ATVs, seasonal equipment

Man Caves

Entertainment spaces, home gyms

Commercial

Retail spaces, offices, warehouses

The CTH Difference

At CTH Contracting Solutions, we've built hundreds of pole barns across Upstate South Carolina. We understand the local climate, soil conditions, and building requirements.

Our team handles everything from permits to final inspection, ensuring your barn is built right and built to last. We use only quality materials and proven construction techniques.

  • ✓ Licensed & Insured
  • ✓ 15+ Years Experience
  • ✓ Free Estimates
  • ✓ Local Experts

Ready to Build Your Pole Barn?

Contact us for a free consultation and detailed estimate.
